title: Effectiveness of Subpart
doc_html:
§1430.4. Effectiveness of Subpart

            This Subpart shall terminate on June 30, 2032.

            Acts 2024, No. 229, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
doc_text:
§1430.4.  Effectiveness of Subpart
This Subpart shall terminate on June 30, 2032.
Acts 2024, No. 229, §1, eff. May 23, 2024.
